[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0010001 2
1 0100111 4
2 0111010 4
3 1100010 3
4 0010000 1
5 0011011 4
6 0110001 3
7 0001000 1

01 0000000 a

67 0011000 2
70 1100010 3 match 3
